caption: In a workshop setting, a person wearing a red long-sleeved garment uses a belt sander to shape a light-colored piece of rectangular wood. The person's hands are visible, firmly holding the wood against the moving sanding belt of the machine. The belt sander is primarily green and grey, featuring a rotating belt and various adjustment knobs. The background is blurred, showing shelving and workshop equipment. Across the sequence, the person subtly shifts the angle of the wood piece against the sanding belt to refine its edge. The on-screen text "[Voice: Philippe Starck]" appears in a white box at the bottom center of each frame, remaining stationary as the action unfolds. There are no significant changes in the environment or the person's position, with the primary motion being the small, controlled movements of the wood being sanded.
